graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/D.general_idea: Replace Lombok @Slf4j annotation with explicit java.util.logging.Logger field to remove dependency on Lombok's annotation processor for logging.
Replace Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor with explicit constructor and field to remove dependency on Lombok's annotation processor for constructor generation.
Refactor data initialization logic from high-level repository abstractions to low-level SQL client operations using Vert.x SQL client API.
Add CountDownLatch synchronization to handle asynchronous completion of the data initialization process.
Add Lombok @SneakyThrows annotation to the run method to suppress checked exceptions.

Apply @SneakyThrows to the run method to allow checked exceptions (like InterruptedException from latch.await) to propagate without explicit try-catch.
